{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Emperor's power
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Emperor's power]] has an irresistible gravity.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
